description: Bug Fix: Registration Redirect + Legal Pages (Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions)

tasks.title: Fix Registration Redirect (Welcome → About Us)
tasks.notes: After renaming Welcome to About Us, registration form was redirecting to /welcome (404). Set WPUM wp_login_signup_redirect to page 6 (About Us). Applied to local and production March 11, 2026.

tasks.title: Log In Page (No Migration Needed)
